anchor: - Logic in the matcher that belongs in the script (regex with bash-specific shape) → simplify.
new_content: - Matcher too **narrow** (omitting a tool the model actually uses) → widen it. Edit-watching hooks must include `Write|Edit|MultiEdit` — all three file-modification tools. Omitting `MultiEdit` leaves a silent gap: the hook never fires when Claude applies several edits in one turn. Don't narrow to only the tools seen in telemetry; cover the full set.
